=========
Structure
=========

structure Point (α : Type u) where
  w : String := "foo"
  x : α
  y : Foo Bar Baz Quux
  z := 0

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)
      default: (string))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (application
        name: (application
          name: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier))
          arguments: (identifier))
        arguments: (identifier)))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      default: (number))))

=================
Structure Extends
=================

structure Bar extends Foo where
  bit : Bool

class Baz extends Quux where
  bit : Bool

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    extends: (identifier)
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)))
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    extends: (identifier)
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))))

==========================
Structure Multiple Extends
==========================

structure Bar extends Foo, Bar α where
  bit : Bool

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    extends: (identifier)
    extends: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))))

===================
Structure No Fields
===================

structure Foo where

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)))

=====
Class
=====

class Quux (a : Type) where
  foo : String := "foo"
  add : a -> a -> a
  bar := 0
  baz {x : String} : String

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)
      default: (string))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (arrow
          domain: (identifier)
          codomain: (identifier))))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      default: (number))
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      type: (identifier))))

===============
Class No Fields
===============

class Foo where

---

(module
  (structure
    name: (identifier)))

========
Instance
========

instance : ToString Foo where
  toString (d : Foo) : String := "Foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      type: (identifier)
      body: (string))))

==============
Named Instance
==============

instance toStringFoo : ToString Foo where
  toString (d : Foo) : String := "Foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      type: (identifier)
      body: (string))))

========================
Instance With Parameters
========================

instance {f : Foo} (g : Bar 3) : Quux where
  foo := f

---

(module
  (definition
    binders: (implicit_binder
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    binders: (explicit_binder
      name: (identifier)
      type: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (number)))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      body: (identifier))))

================
Chained Instance
================

instance [Inhabited b] : Inhabited (a -> b) where
  default := fun _ => arbitrary

---

(module
  (definition
    binders: (instance_binder
      type: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier)))
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (parenthesized
        (arrow
          domain: (identifier)
          codomain: (identifier))))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      body: (fun
        binders: (hole)
        body: (identifier)))))

===================================
Instance With Inductive Constructor
===================================

instance : Inhabited Nat := ⟨0⟩

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (anonymous_constructor
      (number))))

==============================
Instance With Field Definition
==============================

instance : Add Foo := Foo.add

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (identifier))))

========================================
Instance Field With Function Return Type
========================================

instance : ToString Foo where
  toString : Foo → String := λ f => s!"Foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier))
      body: (fun
        binders: (identifier)
        body: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (string))))))

==================================
Instance Field Without Return Type
==================================

instance : ToString Foo where
  toString d := "Foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      body: (string))))

================================
Instance With Match Syntax Sugar
================================

instance : ToString Foo where
  toString
  | _ => "foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      body: (match_arm
        lhs: (hole)
        (string)))))

=======
Example
=======

example : (fun x => x * 2) 4 < 3 = false := rfl

---

(module
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (application
          (parenthesized
            (fun
              (identifier)
              (binary_expression
                (identifier)
                (number))))
          (number))
        (number))
      (false))
    (identifier)))

=======================
Example With Parameters
=======================

example {G : Type} [Add G] (g : G) : g + g = g + g := rfl

---

(module
  (example
    binders: (binders
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      (instance_binder
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier)))
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (identifier)
        right: (identifier))
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (identifier)
        right: (identifier)))
    body: (identifier)))

======================================================
Noncomputable / Partial / Protected / Private / Unsafe
======================================================

partial def foo := 12

partial def g x : Nat := g (x + 1)

noncomputable def foo := 12

protected unsafe def foo := 12

unsafe inductive Foo | foo

private structure Foo where x : Nat

protected class Bar where x : Nat

protected instance : Quux where x := 2

noncomputable instance : Foo where x := 2

private theorem bar : 2 = 2 := rfl

protected example : 2 = 2 := rfl

noncomputable example : 2 = 2 := rfl

protected constant FooBar : Nat

noncomputable constant FooBar : Nat

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (number))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (binders
      (identifier))
    (identifier)
    (application
      (identifier)
      (parenthesized
        (binary_expression
          (identifier)
          (number)))))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (number))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (number))
  (inductive
    (identifier)
    (constructor
      (identifier)))
  (structure
    (identifier)
    (structure_field
      (identifier)
      (identifier)))
  (structure
    (identifier)
    (structure_field
      (identifier)
      (identifier)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (where_decl
      (identifier)
      (number)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (where_decl
      (identifier)
      (number)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))
    (identifier))
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))
    (identifier))
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))
    (identifier))
  (constant
    (identifier)
    (identifier))
  (constant
    (identifier)
    (identifier)))
